opinion.h: WOODS v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE APPELLATE DEPARTMENT, SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES. No. 1006. Decided March 24, 1969.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
394 U.S. 320 BOEING CO. v. HAMM, COMMISSIONER OF REVENUE OF ALABAMA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ALABAMA. No. 1017. Decided March 24, 1969.
MacDonald Gallion, Attorney General of Alabama, and Willard W. Livingston and William H. Burton, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
